prompt: Modern tech company logo on solid black background. A rounded square app-icon shape with a dark gradient background (from charcoal #1A1A1A to black #0A0A0A). Inside, the letters 'MM' are displayed in a custom geometric sans-serif font where the negative space between the letters forms a perfect arrow or forward chevron pointing right — symbolizing growth and forward movement. The letters are white, the hidden arrow shape becomes visible through clever letter spacing and design. Below the icon, 'MM AGENCY' in small white uppercase text with wide letter spacing and a cyan (#00E3FF) period at the end. The overall feel is clever, modern, tech-forward — like Stripe, Notion, or Linear branding. Clean sharp vector quality.
